prompt: A clean anime-style half-body character portrait on a plain off-white background, showing a young female fantasy archer from the chest up, facing slightly away with her back and left shoulder more visible while her head turns subtly to the side. She has {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} shoulder-length wavy bob hair with soft layered ends, a wide {argument name="headband color" default="dark red"} headband, and a large rectangular skin-tone block completely covering the face area so no facial features are visible. She wears a white high ruffled collar blouse, a deep teal-blue outer garment with scalloped trim, and a long mustard-gold scarf draped loosely around the neck and over one shoulder. A brown leather quiver is visible over her right shoulder, holding exactly 5 arrows with white feather fletching and dark shafts. The illustration should have crisp line art, flat cel shading, soft muted colors, and a polished fantasy-anime character design aesthetic reminiscent of a classic RPG portrait. Composition centered, portrait orientation, upper torso crop, minimal background, no extra objects, no text.
translatedPrompt: 一张简洁的动漫风格半身角色肖像，背景为纯净的灰白色。画面展示了一位年轻的女性幻想弓箭手，从胸部以上取景，身体略微背对镜头，背部和左肩更为明显，头部轻微转向侧面。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="金色"} 的齐肩波浪短发，发梢层次柔和，佩戴着宽大的 {argument name="headband color" default="深红色"} 发带，面部区域被一个巨大的肤色长方形色块完全遮挡，因此无法看到任何面部特征。她身穿白色高领荷叶边衬衫，外搭深青蓝色饰有扇形花边的外衣，脖颈和一侧肩膀上随意披着一条芥末金色的长围巾。右肩可见一个棕色皮革箭袋，里面装着 5 支箭，箭羽为白色，箭杆为深色。插画应具备清晰的线条、平涂赛璐珞阴影、柔和的低饱和度色彩，并呈现出类似经典 RPG 肖像的精致幻想动漫角色设计美学。构图居中，肖像方向，上半身裁剪，极简背景，无额外物体，无文字。

breakdown.creativeCore: 动漫弓箭手肖像（面部遮挡）：此提示词可生成一张简洁的幻想动漫风格上半身角色肖像，主角是一位金发弓箭手，面部带有遮挡块，适用于风格化角色艺术或模因风格的头像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；禁止额外文字
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；禁止额外文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
